snapshot_metadata.note: production_judges names behavior_judge — a CANONICAL-roster role (it has a council_roles prompt and an owner-map presence, so it PASSES the judges-consistency gate) that is NOT in the core _ROLE_DEPLOYMENT trio {risk,policy,faithfulness}. Proves the deployment boundary fails-CLEAN: the FROZEN council raises KeyError at construction when it binds the pack identity to a core deployment that does not exist. The invariant: packs SELECT a subset of known deployable identities; introducing a brand-new deployable judge needs CORE deployment support (infra is not domain content). Inert in normal use (pack discovery is active-pack-only).
